EmailTemplate.name: AES - Rejected Certificate
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REJECTED CERTIFICATE.
Hi {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Contact__c},
The {!b3o__Certificate__c.b3o__Certificate_Type__c} certificate has been rejected due to {!b3o__Certificate__c.Rejection_Reason__c}.
Please follow the link below to upload a new certificate and proceed with your application. The {!b3o__Certificate__c.b3o__Certificate_Type__c} certificate is marked with a red dot on the document list.
UPDATE MY DOCUMENTATION
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
